title: Discount 15% off
description: Special Promo valid for Black Friday
terms: This coupon is valid for one ride per user and can be used only for bookings made through the Tripzo app.
The minimum ride fare must be ₹100 to apply the coupon, and the maximum discount available is ₹50.
The coupon is valid only until the expiry date and may apply to selected cities or ride types. Tripzo reserves the right to modify or cancel the offer at any time without prior notice.
